title: Squirrel Removal Long Beach, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Long Beach, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving beachfront & residential areas. Call today!
intro: Long Beach residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or crawl spaces need fast, humane removal services to protect their homes from damage. Our squirrel removal experts serve all of Long Beach, from the boardwalk area to Park Avenue, with comprehensive trapping, exclusion, and prevention solutions. We understand the unique challenges of coastal properties and older beach homes where squirrels commonly seek shelter.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Long Beach homeowners for years with licensed, insured technicians who specialize in humane squirrel removal and long-term exclusion. Our team responds quickly to service calls throughout Long Island, offering transparent pricing and guaranteed results that keep your beachside property squirrel-free.
localContext: Long Beach's mix of historic beach bungalows, mid-century homes, and modern residences along the barrier island creates numerous entry points for squirrels seeking warmth and nesting sites. Properties near West End and East End parks, as well as homes with mature trees along the canal areas, are particularly susceptible to squirrel activity during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Long Beach?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Long Beach typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or restoration is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Long Beach home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wires or wood, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. You may also notice damage to soffits, fascia, or roof vents.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane in Long Beach?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. After capture, squirrels are relocated according to local guidelines. We then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry and offer cleanup services to remove contaminated insulation and droppings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Long Beach property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Long Beach residents. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, though we begin trapping immediately. Complete exclusion work, including sealing entry points and installing preventative barriers, is usually completed within one week.
